title: Linux Reverse Shell Detected
description: Detects common reverse shell patterns in process execution, indicating potential remote access backdoor activity.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/dev/tcp/*' or msg like '*bash -i >&*' or msg like '*nc -e /bin*' or msg like '*ncat -e /bin*' or msg like '*mkfifo /tmp*')))
